Who We Are

Craftsmanship
runs in our blood.

Sofa Xpert was founded by Kabir Rizvi with one mission — to give every worn-out, damaged, or tired piece of furniture a second life. Based in Gurugram, we specialise in repairing and restoring sofas, chairs, beds, and recliners right at your doorstep.

From leather repair and spring replacement to full upholstery restoration, every job gets the same care, skill, and honesty that has made Sofa Xpert Gurugram's most trusted name in furniture repair for over 10 years.

— Kabir Rizvi, Founder

Quality GuaranteedPremium materials, lasting builds
On-Time DeliveryWe respect your time, always
Doorstep ServiceWe come to you, hassle-free
Made with PassionEvery stitch tells a story

What We Do

Our Expertise

A complete furniture solution — from crafting something new to breathing life into the old.

01

Sofa Repair

Complete sofa restoration at your home or our workshop. We fix what others can't.

  • General Sofa Repair (At Home)
  • Leather Sofa Repair
  • Sofa Frame Repair
  • Spring & Cushion Replacement
  • Recliner Repair
02

Bed & Chair Repair

Rejuvenate your bed with fresh upholstery, repaired frames, and custom headboards.

  • Bed Upholstery Repair
  • Chair Repair & Dining Chair Upholstery
  • Leather Furniture Repair
03

Upholstery & Fabric

Refresh your furniture's skin with premium fabrics, leathers, and expert fitting.

  • Sofa Upholstery Repair
  • Sofa Cover Change
  • Sofa Fabric Change / Replacement
  • Leather & Fabric Replacement
04

Restoration & Remodelling

Turn aged, damaged pieces into beautiful functional furniture once more.

  • General Repairs
  • Remodelling
  • Full Restoration
  • Wood Staining
05

Custom Sofa Manufacturing

Envision your dream sofa — crafted to your exact taste, dimensions, and comfort.

  • New Sofa Manufacturing
  • Custom Dimensions
  • Material of Your Choice
  • Modern & Luxury Designs
06

Custom Beds & Stools

Handcrafted beds with custom dimensions and puffy stools for every corner of your home.

  • Custom Bed Manufacturing
  • Bespoke Dimensions
  • Custom Puffy Stools
  • Wall Panels & Curtains

How It Works

Simple Process

From the first conversation to final delivery — we make it seamless.

01

Book

Call or WhatsApp us. Tell us your furniture issue and we'll schedule a doorstep visit at your convenience.

02

Inspect

Our expert visits your home, inspects the damage, and gives you a transparent quote — no hidden charges.

03

Repair

We repair, restore or re-upholster on-site or at our workshop using premium materials and skilled hands.

04

Enjoy

Your furniture is returned looking and feeling brand new. 100% satisfaction guaranteed.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our repair & restoration services.

Yes! Doorstep service is our specialty. Our expert technicians come directly to your home anywhere in Gurugram — Sohna Road, DLF, Sector 33–56, Palam Vihar, and surrounding areas. No need to move your furniture.

Most standard repairs (spring replacement, cushion re-foam, fabric change) are completed within 1–3 days. Full restoration or custom re-upholstery may take 4–7 days. We always give you a clear timeline before starting work.

Absolutely. We specialise in leather sofa repair — fixing tears, cracks, peeling, colour fading, and structural damage. We use high-quality leather and matching dyes to restore your sofa to its original look.

Pricing depends on the type and extent of repair. A basic cushion re-foam starts from ₹1,000, fabric change from ₹2,000, and full restoration varies by size and material. We provide a free inspection and transparent quote before any work begins — no hidden charges.

Yes. We repair all types of recliners (manual and motorised), sofa cum beds, L-shaped sofas, and sectionals. Our technicians are trained to handle mechanical and structural issues as well as fabric and leather work.

Yes — fabric change and re-upholstery are among our most popular services. You can choose from a wide range of fabrics, leathers, and textures. We bring swatches to your home so you can pick the perfect material before we begin.

Simply WhatsApp or call us at +91 93556 55110. Share a photo of the damage and your location, and we'll confirm a visit slot within hours. You can also fill the quote form on this page.

Yes. All our repair and restoration work comes with a service warranty. The duration depends on the type of work — fabric and upholstery work is typically covered for 6 months, and structural repairs for up to 1 year.
